message:
feat(cli): add timeline markers for prompt sending and session kill

send.go:
- Update sendPromptToPane() to accept session parameter
- Add timeline prompt markers when sending to agent panes
- Add timeline stop markers on pane/session kill
- addTimelinePromptMarker(): Records prompt sent to agent with metadata
- addTimelineStopMarkers(): Records agent stop events with final state

Timeline marker types:
- MarkerPrompt: Records prompts sent to agents
- MarkerStop: Records agent termination events

These changes enable comprehensive session timeline tracking for
debugging and replay, capturing when prompts were sent and when
agents stopped.

spawn.go:
- Minor refactoring for timeline integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
